statement.p: Jayda filled the gas tank in her car to {18\ {\rm gal}}\text{.} When the tank reaches {1\ {\rm gal}}\text{,} the low gas light will come on. On average, Jaydas car uses {0.041\ {\rm gal}} per mile driven. How many miles will Jaydas car be able to drive before the low gas light comes on?
